title: Gethyra punicea
taxonomy: Gethyra punicea is classified within the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and morphological features. The Euphorbiaceae family comprises approximately 320 genera and over 7,500 species, many of which are woody plants. However, Gethyra punicea's specific classification may vary depending on the source or recent taxonomic revisions. Further research may be necessary to determine the plant's exact classification within the Euphorbiaceae family.
